name: 0.5 HP Precision Grinding Machine
description: A compact, vibration-damped 0.5 HP bench grinder built for daily workshop use. Hardened cast-iron base, sealed bearings and an inverter-grade motor keep grinding smooth even under continuous load.

name: Special CNC Jaws Set — 100 / 150 / 200 mm
description: Soft-blank CNC chuck jaws machined to tight tolerances. Comes as a graded 100 / 150 / 200 mm trio so a single set covers your light, medium and heavy turning needs.

name: 10 × 12 Pneumatic Push-In Connectors — Pack of 50
description: Brass-bodied push-in straight connector for 10 mm OD tube to 12 mm thread. Rated for 0–10 bar at 60 °C, with a self-locking collet.

name: Carbide 2-Flute Drills 10.2 mm — Pack of 3
description: Micro-grain solid-carbide twist drill, AlTiN-coated for high-speed dry drilling in alloy steel and stainless. Internal coolant channels keep chip evacuation clean.

name: 10 mm Industrial Air Hose — 50 m Coil
description: PU-lined fabric-reinforced 10 mm pneumatic hose. Flexible at low temperatures, abrasion-resistant outer jacket; sold by 10 m coil.

name: 10 mm Precision Drill Chuck
description: Self-tightening 10 mm keyless drill chuck with hardened steel jaws and ≤0.05 mm runout — drops straight into B16 / JT6 spindles.

name: 10 mm HSS Endmills (4-Flute) — Pack of 5
description: M2 HSS 4-flute square endmill, 10 mm diameter, TiN-coated. A reliable workhorse for slotting and profiling mild steel, aluminium and brass.

name: 10 mm H-TECH Insert Cutter Tool Holder
description: 10 mm shank indexable cutter holder for APMT-style inserts. Internal coolant port, hardened anti-vibration body — ideal for finishing passes on the lathe.

name: Multi-Core Industrial Cable — 100 m Roll
description: Flexible PVC-sheathed multi-core 10 m cable for control panels and CNC pendants. Oil and coolant resistant, EMI screened.

name: 1-1/4" Heavy-Duty Hex Nuts — Box of 100
description: Grade-10 hardened hex nut, 1-1/4" UNC. Zinc-plated finish suited for jig, fixture and chuck-stop applications.

name: 1.1/8 × 12 UNF HSS-E Taps — Pack of 3
description: HSS-E (5 % cobalt) hand tap, 1.1/8 × 12 UNF. Spiral-point geometry pushes chips forward — perfect for through-holes in steel.

name: 1/2 × 12 BSW Spiral-Flute Taps — Pack of 5
description: HSS spiral-flute BSW tap, 1/2-12. Pulls chips up out of blind holes; suitable for stainless and tough alloy steels.

name: 12" / 300 mm Stainless Steel Scales — Pack of 10
description: Hardened stainless 300 mm scale with dual imperial / metric etched graduations. Satin-chrome finish for glare-free reading.

name: 1/2" Bore Threading Tool
description: 1/2" shank single-point internal threading tool. Pre-ground 60° insert seat, fits standard ISO carbide inserts.

name: 1/2" Right-Hand Boring Bar
description: Solid steel 1/2" RH boring bar for through and blind-hole boring on the lathe. Replaceable CCMT-insert pocket.

name: 1/2" Grooving Tool
description: 1/2" external grooving tool with hardened seat for 2 mm and 3 mm wide insert blades — clean O-ring grooves and parting cuts.

name: 1/2" Right-Hand Threading Bar
description: Right-hand external threading toolholder for 1/2" lathes. Accepts standard 16ER ISO threading inserts.

name: 1/4" Right-Hand Boring Bar
description: Compact 1/4" RH boring bar for small-bore operations. Mirror-finish ground shank, indexable CCMT pocket.

name: 1/4" BSW Thread Plug Gauge (Go / No-Go)
description: Calibrated 1/4" BSW Go / No-Go plug gauge in a wooden case. Issued with a manufacturer calibration certificate.

name: 165 mm Chuck T-Nuts — Set of 4
description: Hardened T-nut for 165 mm 3-jaw and 4-jaw lathe chucks. Drop-in replacement that restores grip and concentricity.

name: 16ER 1.5 ISO Threading Insert (10 pcs)
description: Pack of 10 carbide 16ER 1.5 ISO threading inserts with TiAlN coating. For external metric threads in steel and stainless.

name: Monthly On-Site Maintenance Plan (6 Visits + Daily 30-min NICL Session)
description: Service package: 6 scheduled on-site engineer visits per month plus a 30-minute daily review call with your NICL team. Covers preventive maintenance, spindle calibration and operator training.

name: Industrial Nylon Rope — 50 m Coil
description: Braided high-tensile nylon rope, 1 m length. UV-stabilised, oil resistant — ideal for tying down loads and counterweights.

name: 4" Cut-Off Wheels — Pack of 50
description: Bonded aluminium-oxide 4" cut-off wheels. Sold in packs of 10 — fits all standard angle grinders for cutting metal stock.

name: NSK 51308 Thrust Bearings — Pack of 2
description: Genuine NSK 51308 single-direction thrust ball bearing, 40 × 78 × 26 mm. Used in vertical lathe spindles and gearbox shafts.

name: SKF 6001 ZZ C3 Deep-Groove Bearings — Pack of 5
description: SKF 6001 ZZ C3 sealed deep-groove ball bearing, 12 × 28 × 8 mm. C3 clearance for high-speed motor spindles.

name: Lathe Turning Combo (3-in-1) — Boring + Threading + Grooving
description: Three of our most-used lathe turning tools bundled together. Covers external grooving, external threading and internal boring — a complete starter kit for any turning shop.

name: Drill & Chuck Starter Pack (3-in-1) — Chuck + Endmill + Connector
description: Everything you need to bring a new milling spindle online: a precision 10 mm keyless chuck, an HSS 4-flute endmill and a matching pneumatic connector for the coolant line.

name: Precision Measurement Kit (3-in-1) — Scale + Gauge + Insert
description: An inspection-bench essentials kit. A 300 mm stainless scale for layout, a calibrated 1/4" BSW plug gauge for thread verification and a fresh threading insert for re-cutting if you fail the gauge.
bundleItems: 12" / 300 mm Stainless Steel Scales — Pack of 10

name: Carbide Power Bundle (3-in-1) — Drill + Cutter Holder + Endmill
description: Heavy-duty carbide trio for tough cutting jobs: a 10.2 mm carbide drill, an H-TECH insert cutter holder and a TiN-coated HSS endmill. Built for stainless and tool-steel production work.
bundleItems: 10 mm H-TECH Insert Cutter Tool Holder

name: Milling Essentials Combo (3-in-1) — Endmill + Holder + Chuck
description: A balanced milling starter set covering shoulder milling, face milling and drilling — endmill, indexable cutter holder and matching keyless drill chuck.
bundleItems: 10 mm H-TECH Insert Cutter Tool Holder

name: Workshop Maintenance Kit (3-in-1) — Hose + Cable + Rope
description: Replenish the consumables drawer in one click: 10 m of pneumatic hose, a 10 m flexible control cable and 1 m of braided nylon rope.
bundleItems: 10 mm Industrial Air Hose — 50 m Coil

name: Industrial Bearing Set (3-in-1) — NSK 51308 + SKF 6001 + T-Nut
description: Spindle-rebuild bundle: a genuine NSK thrust bearing, an SKF deep-groove ball bearing and a 165 mm chuck T-nut to refit the chuck after the rebuild.
bundleItems: SKF 6001 ZZ C3 Deep-Groove Bearings — Pack of 5

name: CNC Special Jaws Trio (3-Piece Set 100 / 150 / 200 mm)
description: Graded set of 100, 150 and 200 mm soft-blank CNC chuck jaws. Buy once and cover small, medium and heavy turning jobs without re-machining.

name: Machine Starter Pack (3-in-1) — Grinder + Chuck + Tap
description: Open a new workshop floor with this top-end starter pack — a 0.5 HP grinder for tool sharpening, a 10 mm drill chuck for the mill and a 1/2-12 BSW spiral tap for assembly work.

name: Threading Master Kit (3-in-1) — Tap + Insert + Bar
description: Threading from start to finish: a UNF HSS-E hand tap for cut threads, an ISO threading insert for production threading on the lathe and the matching threading bar.

name: 12 mm HSS 2-Flute Endmills — Pack of 5
description: 12 mm HSS 2-flute endmill with extended flute length for deep slotting in aluminium and free-cutting steels.

name: 5/8" Right-Hand Threading Bar
description: 5/8" external threading bar for medium-size lathes. Wider seat accepts 22ER inserts for larger thread pitches.

name: 20 mm Heavy-Duty Drill Chuck
description: 20 mm capacity industrial drill chuck with three-jaw self-centering, B22 spindle taper. Rated for up to 4500 rpm under continuous duty.

name: 25 mm Carbide Roughing Endmill
description: 25 mm solid-carbide roughing endmill, corn-cob serrated flutes. Removes material at high feed rates with reduced cutter load.

name: 150 mm Digital Vernier Caliper
description: 0.01 mm resolution digital caliper, 150 mm range. IP54-rated case, auto-off, mm / inch / fraction modes.

name: Dial Indicator with Magnetic Stand
description: 0.01 mm dial indicator paired with a flexible-arm magnetic base. For tramming spindles, checking runout and aligning vices.

name: Drill + Endmill Combo (2-in-1) — Carbide Drill + HSS Endmill
description: A drill-and-mill pair for one-setup work — a carbide drill to open the hole and a matching HSS endmill to enlarge or profile it.

name: Tap + Threading Insert Combo (2-in-1) — Hand Tap + ISO Insert
description: Cover hand tapping and CNC threading in one purchase — a UNF HSS-E hand tap for fixturing work plus an ISO threading insert for production runs.

name: ₹1 Test Product — Payment Smoke Test
description: Internal test SKU priced at ₹1 (≈ $0.01 / €0.01). Use this to smoke-test the live PayGlocal flow end-to-end — a real charge is created, the webhook fires, and the admin panel updates — all without spending real money. Hide this from the storefront before going public.
